caps_tested.original_question: Does your solution manage multiple price lists, volume discounts, promotions and coupon codes, with approval workflows and margin visibility to protect pricing integrity?
caps_tested.trimmed_question: Does your solution support pricing, discounts & promotions? Specifically: Configure discount approval workflows with role-based thresholds to control margin protection and pricing authority; Manage coupon and promotional codes with redemption tracking and validity constraints; Define pricing rules and mark-up strategies applicable to products, customer segments, or sales channels
